days.summary: Developer/introspection mode grew up: a titanium-gray theme (with iOS PWA status-bar tint fixes), native tool-calling that agentically reads the site's own source on both tiers, and a committed source-RAG index behind it. Two admin decision boards landed — the features priority channel and the votes-only panel-attention board — alongside this Project pulse dashboard itself. Branding moved to the CamelCase wordmarks (DeepResearch.Se/cure and DeepResearch.Se/rver) with tightened slashes, the sandbox's auto-popping terminal became a faint background activity layer, and the welcome page was reframed around features.

days.summary: Introspection mode gained an OWASP Top 10 default with a security-assessment reference corpus and an executive-summary report format, surfaced the skills catalog to any model, and settled its per-tier skins (amethyst Se/rver, ruby Se/cure). The repo's git workflow was reconciled: the merge barrier was activated, both PR and direct-merge styles were adopted, and the merge-branches and pr skills plus their branch ledger were added. The project's mission was reframed around LLM-privacy-capabilities research (secure-first pairing), the DRC intro got its Victorian umbrellas reviving from wireframe into color, and the sandbox picked up full boot-timeline debug coverage.
